rule: global pending-invoice sweeps scan one bounded list_transactions page per durable global gate claim
required_behaviors: empty open invoice sets perform zero wallet calls
non-empty sweeps claim the durable global scan gate before wallet access
each claimed sweep performs at most one incoming unpaid list_transactions page capped at 50
full pages move until_cursor down to the oldest created_at in the page
short pages reset until_cursor to now
cursor does not advance on wallet timeout or error
sweep windows run from oldest open invoice creation minus overlap through the global cursor
new invoices above the cursor do not shift or skip older unscanned transactions
transactions match local invoices globally by payment_hash with BOLT11 invoice fallback
